name: momentum (TSMOM) across asset classes / AQR (free)
verification: Pre-built AQR factor return streams, NOT routed through the verified daily backtester. Breadth/generalisation evidence only; the no-look-ahead guarantee is scoped to the daily equity backtest.
reproduction_note: Diversified all-asset TSMOM Sharpe vs Moskowitz-Ooi-Pedersen (2012), reported as >1.0 (a lower bound); per-sleeve TSMOM Sharpes are computed from AQR data, not published.
published_source: Moskowitz, Ooi, Pedersen (2012), 'Time Series Momentum', JFE 104(2): the diversified all-asset TSMOM Sharpe is reported as >1.0 (gross, 1985-2009); the paper does not tabulate per-sleeve Sharpes, so per-sleeve figures here are computed from the AQR data, not quoted.
verification_status: Verification: Lean build green => no look-ahead, no train/test leakage (out-of-sample embargo at least the holding horizon), and signal measurable against the information set at each date (adapted to the natural price filtration, citing the FTAP development) are machine-checked; the projection and convergence of the PGD portfolio solver are proven sorry-free in Lean (optimization-proofs). Scope: the no-look-ahead guarantee covers the daily equity backtester; the cross-asset streams are breadth evidence, not verified runs.
